subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Be thou enchanted by the remembrance of the Ancient King, and efface from thy heart whatsoever preventeth thee from immersing thyself in the depths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم انس بذکر سلطان القدم و امح عن قلبک ما یمنعک عن التغمس فی غمرات
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
